[[File:Dragon sword detail.png|left|130px]]
The '''dragon sword''' is a one-handed stab weapon obtained as a rare drop from [[wyrm]]s or [[lost ironwood crate]]s, and requires 60 [[Attack]] to wield. It has the highest [[stab attack]] bonus of the [[Sword#Standard_swords|standard shortswords]], and the third highest stab attack bonus of all shortswords. The dragon sword provides 2 less stab attack than the [[leaf-bladed sword]], but provides 13 more [[strength bonus]].

As with most [[dragon equipment]], the dragon sword '''cannot''' be made from raw materials using the [[Smithing]] skill.

==Special attack==
[[File:Wild Stab.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the dragon sword's special attack, ''Wild Stab''.]]
The dragon sword has a [[special attack]], ''Wild Stab'', that consumes 40% of the player's [[special attack energy]] to hit the target with 25% increased accuracy and damage. If the target is using [[Protect from Melee]], the special attack will ignore the [[prayer]] for one attack. This special rolls off of the opponent's stab defence regardless of which mode it is in.

}}
